description.en: Favor missiles and Hybrid Turrets. Prioritize shields over speed.
Prefer Projectile Turrets. Balance shield and armor with speed.
Excel at engagements using Energy Turrets, backed up by drones. Prioritize armor over speed.
Rely on Hybrid Turrets, backed up by drones. Balance armor with speed.
Favors versatility with support for all weapon types. Balance speed with either armor or shields.
Combines missiles and drones. Uses shields to outlast opponents.
Masters of Projectile Turrets. Favor speed.
Specialize in electronic warfare and Energy Turrets. Prefer armor for anyone who gets too close.
Industrial backbone of New Eden. Depend on others to fight for them. Rely on shields if all else fails.
Balance drones with Energy Turrets. High agility but low speed.
Favors versatility with support for all weapon types. Lack speed but capable with either armor or shields.
Proficient missile users. Rely on speed and shields for defense.
Prefer Energy Turrets. Use strong defensive shields.
Favor Hybrid Turrets. Combine armor with acceleration.
Use Entropic Disintegrators. Heavily favor armor.
Use Vorton Projectors. Heavily favor shields.
Use Breacher Pod Launchers. Favors Projectile Turrets and hit-and-run tactics.
